_comment: APPROXIMATE USD per 1,000,000 tokens, USER-TUNABLE. The aggregator computes delegate cost/savings centrally from token counts because not every delegate emits USD (kimi emits none). These are estimates for cross-delegate comparison, not billing. Tune to real provider rates before citing dollar figures.

parent_model._note: Rate of the orchestrating (parent) model whose context the delegate saved. savings = estimated_tokens_saved * output_per_mtok.

prefixes._note: Matched by longest model_used prefix when no exact match (covers fallback:codex:*, fallback:*, devin:*, etc.).
